title: Privacy Policy

meta.line1: Document describing how user data may be processed on the TyPlace platform.
meta.line2: The current version is published on this page.

intro: This Privacy Policy describes what data the TyPlace platform may process, for what purposes such processing is carried out, how the data is used, and what rights the user may have.

section1.title: 1. Who processes the data
section1.p1: The data operator within the operation of the TyPlace platform is the person managing the platform. Current contact methods are available on the

section2.title: 2. What data may be processed
section2.l2: username, user ID, avatar, and other profile data that the user provides or uploads to the platform;
section2.l3: technical data, including IP address, device data, browser data, and the date and time of actions performed on the platform;
section2.l4: data related to listings, orders, reviews, support requests, disputes, and actions within the platform;
section2.l5: the content of platform chat messages and attachments sent through chat or support;
section2.l6: data related to internal balance, operation history, withdrawal requests, top-ups, and other financial actions within the platform;
section2.l7: notification-related data, including email notifications and, where connected, Telegram notifications;
section2.l8: other data voluntarily provided by the user or generated through the use of the service.

section3.title: 3. Purposes of data processing
section3.l2: operation of listings, orders, safe transactions, internal balance, and other platform functions;
section3.l3: processing of top-ups, deductions, refunds, and withdrawal requests;
section3.l4: handling support requests, disputes, and appeals;
section3.l5: communication with the user regarding the account, orders, security, and platform operation;
section3.l6: detection of fraud, abuse, suspicious activity, and other risks;
section3.l7: security, logging of activity, and technical diagnostics;
section3.l8: improving the stability, functionality, and quality of the platform.

section4.title: 4. Legal grounds for processing
section4.p1: The platform may process user data on the following grounds:
section4.l1: the necessity to perform the Terms of Use and provide platform functionality;
section4.l2: the legitimate interest of the platform in ensuring security, stability, and protection of the service against abuse;
section4.l3: the user's consent, where such consent is required under applicable rules or the logic of the service;
section4.l4: the necessity to comply with mandatory requirements of applicable law.

section5.title: 5. Transfer of data to third parties
section5.p1: The platform may transfer data to third parties only to the extent necessary for the operation of the service and the relevant purposes.
section5.l2: hosting providers, email services, security tools, analytics tools, and other technical services;
section5.l3: services related to security, anti-fraud, logging, and abuse prevention;
section5.l4: public authorities, rights holders, or other persons where such transfer is required on mandatory legal grounds.

section6.title: 6. International nature of processing
section6.p1: The platform and the technical services it uses may involve data processing in different countries. The user understands that some of the technical infrastructure, providers, and communication channels may be located outside the user's country.

section7.title: 7. Data retention period
section7.p1: Data may be retained for the duration of the user's account, for the period necessary for the operation of platform functions, dispute handling, support processing, abuse prevention, and for any other period reasonably necessary to perform the platform's obligations and protect its legitimate interests.

section8.title: 8. Security and anti-fraud
section8.p1: The platform applies technical and organizational measures to protect data and may also use internal checks, restrictions, activity logs, and automated and manual risk analysis mechanisms aimed at ensuring the security of the service, users, and operations.

section9.title: 9. User rights
section9.p1: Depending on applicable law, the user may have the right to:
section9.l1: receive information about the processing of their data;
section9.l2: request correction of inaccurate or outdated data;
section9.l3: request deletion of data where such deletion is permitted and does not conflict with mandatory requirements or the platform's legitimate interests;
section9.l4: restrict certain processing methods in the cases provided for by applicable law;
section9.l5: submit a request regarding data processing through the platform's available communication channels;
section9.p2: For data-related questions, requests may be sent to:

section10.title: 10. Cookies and similar technologies
section10.p1: The platform may use cookies and similar technologies. This is described in more detail in the

section11.title: 11. Changes to this policy
section11.p1: The platform may update this Privacy Policy. The current version is published on this page, and continued use of the platform after an update means acceptance of the new version to the extent applicable.
